title: Simone Cancielo tweet — $30k/mo social awkwardness app idea
html:
Tweet from @simonecanciello: "no one's building a mobile app for social awkwardness. 1) fix self-esteem 2) rewire brain 3) help talking to ppl irl — introverts would pay to fix that, $30k/mo idea." Captured next to TikTok keyword volumes — Yahir tagging this as a candidate.

social awkwardness app idea · simone canciello · tiktok search volume
